'''nahawa''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:foetoprotein|foetoprotein]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-h-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:foetoprotein|foetoprotein]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| nahawa
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:næhæwæth|næhæwæth]] || [[word:næhæwæj|næhæwæj]] || [[word:næhæwæsh|næhæwæsh]] || [[word:næhæwæ|næhæwæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:nahahawath|nahahawath]] || [[word:nahahawaj|nahahawaj]] || [[word:nahahawash|nahahawash]] || [[word:nahahawa|nahahawa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:nahawath|nahawath]] || [[word:nahawaj|nahawaj]] || [[word:nahawash|nahawash]] || [[word:nahawa|nahawa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:nahafwath|nahafwath]] || [[word:nahafwaj|nahafwaj]] || [[word:nahafwash|nahafwash]] || [[word:nahafwaf|nahafwaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:nahawatha|nahawatha]] || [[word:nahawaja|nahawaja]] || [[word:nahawasha|nahawasha]] || [[word:nahawaka|nahawaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:nahawath|nahawath]] || [[word:nahawaj|nahawaj]] || [[word:nahawash|nahawash]] || [[word:nahawa|nahawa]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:nahawathal|nahawathal]] || [[word:nahawajal|nahawajal]] || [[word:nahawashal|nahawashal]] || [[word:nahawakal|nahawakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:nahawathatha|nahawathatha]] || [[word:nahawajaja|nahawajaja]] || [[word:nahawashasha|nahawashasha]] || [[word:nahawaka|nahawaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:nahawathan|nahawathan]] || [[word:nahawajan|nahawajan]] || [[word:nahawashan|nahawashan]] || [[word:nahawakan|nahawakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:nahawathaoro|nahawathaoro]] || [[word:nahawajaoro|nahawajaoro]] || [[word:nahawashaoro|nahawashaoro]] || [[word:nahawakaoro|nahawakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a335513}}
